T0035.title: Error Code Fix
T0035.definition: An informal service or guarantee offered within the credit intermediary ecosystem, promising to resolve specific error codes that prevent loan disbursement. When a financial institution's system flags a transaction and blocks funding, these intermediaries claim they can provide the necessary fix or override code to force the loan through.

T0035.usageExample: 我这单子银行提示代码E018拒了，找了个中介说包解，收费20个点，不知道是不是真的能解开。
